## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component or feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / Storybook
- [ ] Internal / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Added or updated Storybook stories
- [ ] Verified keyboard navigation and screen-reader behavior
- [ ] Ran `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test`
- [ ] Added a changeset (`npm run changeset`) for any consumer-facing change
